title: 10 best herbal creams for foot odor
description: Melaleuca alternifolia, also known as tea tree, creams helps with foot odor because of its potent antimicrobial properties. The active compound, terpinen-4-ol, disrupts the growth of odor-causing bacteria, such as Staphylococcus and E. coli, that thrive on the feet. By inhibiting these microorganisms, tea tree creams reduce the production of volatile organic compounds (VOCs) responsible for foot odor. This natural antifungal and antibacterial agent works to keep the feet fresh and odor...
